summary.note: Binding K = fewest KM timepoints among arms with N (weakest arm limits a 2-arm reconstruction). Reliability bands from the operating curve e(K) in PAPER.md: K>=6 reliable, K=5 borderline, K=3-4 weak. Structured NAR count corroborates the AACT zero-NAR finding. badge/exportable from the shipped engine self-audit (ensemble disabled for determinism).
